mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT permission.number FROM t_sys_permission permission INNER JOIN t_sys_role_perms role_perms ON role_perms.permission_id = permission.id INNER JOIN t_sys_user_role user_role ON user_role.role_id = role_perms.role_id WHERE user_role.user_id = #{userId} AND user_role.org_id = #{orgId}
AND permission.number LIKE CONCAT(#{prefix}, '%')
